color-no-hex.message: Hard-coded hex colors are not allowed — use a semantic or component token.

unit-disallowed-list.message: Hard-coded px values are not allowed — use a token (rem-based scales; px lives only in tokens/*.json).

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Primitive tokens (numeric scale steps like --color-gray-500 or --space-100) are not allowed in component SCSS — use semantic (--color-*) or component (--button-*) tokens.
